cards.back: The principle that AI systems should make decisions that are unbiased and just, avoiding harm to marginalized or vulnerable groups.
The practice of making AI decision-making processes and data sources accessible to ensure accountability and trust.
The responsibility to identify and mitigate the impact of AI decisions, and to take corrective action when harm occurs.
The accountability of developers, deployers, and users of AI systems for their impact and decisions.
The protection of individuals' personal information and data from unauthorized collection, use, or disclosure by AI systems.
